channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: National Recording Registry adds Taylor Swift, Beyoncé, Ray Charles, and more.
item.description: The Library of Congress announced 25 recordings to be preserved for future generations on the National Recording Registry.

item.title: Appeals court to hear arguments over Trump's orders targeting law firms.
item.description: An appeals court will hear arguments Thursday on the Trump administration's effort to reinstate executive orders that sought sanctions against four law firms.

item.title: Xi warns Trump that US and China will 'clash' if Taiwan is handled 'improperly'.
item.description: President Donald Trump met with Chinese President Xi Jinping during his multi-day state visit in Beijing.

item.title: WATCH: Students raise money to protect eagle habitat.
item.description: Elementary school students are holding lemonade stands and bake sales to help save an eagle habitat from being developed into luxury homes.
